MRR Calculation Methodology

DecisionRule
Data SourcePaddle Billing only (Oct 2024+). Classic Paddle excluded.
Txn FilterOnly status = completed (34,649 of 190,750 transactions).
Currency (v3)FX rate from transactions CSV. 31% non-USD transactions.
Discounts (v3)net_usd = (subtotal - discount) x rate. MRR = actual payments.
ExclusionsProration credits and 100% discounted items excluded (1,714 items).
MRR FormulaAnnual: net_usd / 12. Monthly: net_usd / freq.
MovementsNew Biz: first-ever. Reactivation: returned after gap. Expansion/Contraction: diff.
NRR(Opening + Expansion + Reactivation - Contraction - Churn) / Opening. Period avg.
CustomersDeduplicated by email. ARPA = Closing MRR / Customers. LTV = ARPA / Avg Churn.
WaterfallClosing = Opening + New + Expansion + Reactivation - Contraction - Churn.

Generated: 2026-04-21 09:43 · 2025-01 to 2026-04 · 10,042 customers tracked
